brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime, SOC 2 Type II Certified
One Platform for HIPAA-Ready Voice AI in Healthcare
Own Network Voice AI Ensuring HIPAA and PCI Compliance
Voice AI Co-Located with Telephony for Minimal Latency
Trusted Voice AI for Healthcare with SOC 2 and HIPAA Compliance
Secure Voice AI Communications with Sub-200ms Inference
Telnyx Voice AI: HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI Compliant in One Platform
Global HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with 99.999% Uptime
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI operates on a proprietary network with sub-200ms latency, ensuring secure and compliant patient communications under HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI standards.
Manage patient voice interactions securely across 140+ countries using a single platform built for healthcare providers requiring HIPAA-ready, SOC 2 Type II certified solutions.
Our platform delivers 99.999% uptime with voice AI inference co-located on telephony infrastructure to minimize latency and maintain compliance with HIPAA and PCI.
Secure patient communication is enabled by Telnyx Voice AI’s ownership of the network, eliminating third-party vendors and ensuring consistent compliance and performance.
Telnyx provides healthcare-grade voice AI with comprehensive compliance certifications and global reach, consolidating multiple vendor functions into a single, reliable platform.
